name_en: Top-tier exclusive authentic photos 【M83500】 This Lou wallet is made of Monogram jacquard fabric, featuring a tweed-like appearance and texture. Natural leather trim complements this design, which is characterized by its square shape and two types of closures. Despite its small size, this wallet features a generous coin pocket, a bill compartment, and six card slots.
name_cn:

Natural leather trim complements this design, which is characterized by its square shape and two types of closures. 11.5x8.5x2.2cm
